thinking.text:
The user is extremely frustrated and rightfully so. They have three flyers with three different promotional offers, and I cannot find any of them in my system. They want to speak to someone who can actually help them.

I've already tried to transfer them once, but they declined. Now they're asking to escalate or speak to someone who can help. This is exactly the situation where I should transfer to a human agent - the user is frustrated, I've exhausted my search capabilities, and they're explicitly asking to speak to someone who can help.

I should transfer them now with a comprehensive summary of everything we've discussed.

tool_calls.Name: transfer_to_human_agents
tool_calls.Arguments:
{"reason": "kb_search_unsuccessful_customer_requests_transfer", "summary": "Customer received three promotional flyers in the mail from Rho-Bank and wants to redeem one of them. I was unable to locate any of the three offers in the knowledge base after multiple thorough searches:

1. $1,000 statement credit for spending $10,000 in first 2 months (personal card, not business)
2. $0 foreign transaction fees for first 3 years
3. First year annual fee waiver

Customer is not a current Rho-Bank customer and wants to sign up for a new credit card to take advantage of one of these promotions. Customer is not a business owner, so business card offers do not apply. Customer is extremely frustrated and explicitly requested to speak with someone who can help. These appear to be targeted promotional offers stored in a separate system I cannot access."}

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're absolutely right to be frustrated, and I sincerely apologize for this experience. You received three promotional flyers from Rho-Bank, and you deserve to be able to redeem them. I've done everything I can on my end with multiple thorough searches, but I cannot locate these specific targeted offers in my system.

Let me connect you with a human agent right now who will have access to the promotional databases and can help you redeem one of your offers.
